GeoDusterLists.MuxMacro:
//MuxMacro::Mux2 Swayp[7:0] = GetActiveWaypoint(void) Sdate[9:0] = GetDate(void) Stime[11:0] = GetTime(void) Sbin[1168:0] = ToHex(Dspec,0,583) Spdn[3:0] = ExIEEEShortU(Dspec,62,256) Sreal[8:3] = ExIEEEFloat(Dspec,10) Slive[8:3] = ExIEEEFloat(Dspec,14) BaroV[8:4] = ExIEEEFloat(Dspec,18) TempV[8:4] = ExIEEEFloat(Dspec,22) HumdV[8:4] = ExIEEEFloat(Dspec,26) Srate[10:3] = ExIEEEFloat(Dspec,58) Sk[10:3] = ArraySum(Spdn,190,227) Su[10:3] = ArraySum(Spdn,100,127) Sth[10:3] = ArraySum(Spdn,160,180) Sa0[10:3] = ExIEEEFloat(Dspec,30) Sa1[10:3] = ExIEEEFloat(Dspec,34) Sa2[10:3] = ExIEEEFloat(Dspec,38)
Sbaro[9:2] = Evaluate({BaroV-0.322}/0.0054+200) Stemp[8:2] = Evaluate({TempV*100.0}-273.15) Shumd[8:2] = Evaluate({HumdV-0.958}*32.59)
Sxgps[15:7] = InterpValueAt(Sbin,Xgps) Sygps[15:7] = InterpValueAt(Sbin,Ygps) Szgps[9:3] = InterpValueAt(Sbin,Zgps)
Sralt[10:3] = InterpValueAt(Sbin,Raltr)
M2st[5:0] = GetMuxStatus(void) M2clk[12:0] = GetMuxInitTime(void)
M2txt[2400:0] = OutTxt(SPC,3,M2st,M2clk,Sdate,Stime,Swayp,Sxgps,Sygps,Szgps,Sralt,BaroV,TempV,HumdV,Sbaro,Stemp,Shumd,Sreal,Slive,Srate,Sk,Su,Sth,Sa0,Sa1,Sa2,Sbin)
